response.justification: Maria is a strong, versatile senior engineer with nearly two decades of production experience across web, backend, and embedded systems, and her current role includes relevant MCP and agentic-workflow tooling. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and her demonstrable AI/GenAI experience spans roughly one year. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or designing AI systems on major cloud platforms at the depth this staff-level, customer-facing GenAI role demands.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with MCP servers and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq
Deep full-stack engineering background (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK) with production systems at scale
Proven mentorship and technical communication skills through workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of relevant AI work)
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting work
